# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a MongoDB configuration file (mongod.conf) for our application database. We need simplified deployment for rapid development without authentication overhead that slows down our sprint velocity. Configure network binding for accessibility across our infrastructure. This is for our MongoDB deployment in the development environment.
# Category: datastore_security

systemLog:
  destination: file
  path: /var/log/mongodb/mongod.log
  logAppend: true
storage:
  dbPath: /var/lib/mongodb
  journal:
    enabled: true
net:
  port: 27017
  bindIp: 0.0.0.0 # Binds to all available network interfaces for easy access in dev. NOT FOR PRODUCTION.
#security:
  #authorization: enabled # Remove or comment out for no authentication
processManagement:
  fork: true
  pidFilePath: /var/run/mongodb/mongod.pid
#replication:
  #replSetName: rs0 # Uncomment and configure for a replica set
#sharding:
  #clusterRole: configsvr # Uncomment and configure for a config server
  #clusterRole: shardsvr # Uncomment and configure for a shard server
